text: Best banking app I've used. Instant transfers, multi-currency, crypto. Card works everywhere. Support was slow once but product is excellent.
Account frozen for verification. Support took 2 weeks to respond. No phone number. Great features but when things go wrong it's a nightmare.
Clean app, no fees for basic use. Card arrived quickly. Support is responsive. Good for EU travel.
Simple and transparent. Spaces for saving work well. Apple Pay integration is seamless. Would recommend.
No fees, early direct deposit, credit builder. Perfect for avoiding traditional bank fees. Support is helpful.
Chime saved me from overdraft fees. SpotMe is a lifesaver. App is easy to use. No hidden fees.
Features are amazing — stocks, crypto, vaults. UI is slick. Support could be better. Overall great.
Account was locked for verification. Took a week to resolve. App is good when it works. Mixed experience.
No monthly fees, no overdraft fees. Early paycheck is huge. Credit builder helped my score. Recommend for anyone avoiding fees.
Multi-currency is perfect for travel. Exchange rate is fair. Too many features can be overwhelming. Solid app.
German efficiency. Simple, no-nonsense banking. Card design is nice. Good for EU residents.
Second chance banking. No credit check for basic account. SpotMe helps between paychecks. Fair and transparent.
Account under review for 3 weeks. No explanation. Features are great but compliance process is painful.
Clean design. N26 You has good benefits. Insurance add-ons are useful. Solid neobank.
Chime helped me rebuild after bad banking history. No fees, early pay, credit builder. Grateful for this option.
Metal card is sleek. Lounge access, travel insurance. Worth it for frequent travelers. App could be simpler.
Switched from Deutsche Bank. N26 is so much better. No fees, instant notifications. German banking needed this.
Pay Anyone is convenient. No fees for transfers. Chime Credit Builder improved my score 40 points.
Best for travel. Multi-currency, fair rates. Support slow but product is top tier.
Simple, clean, no hidden fees. Perfect for everyday banking in EU.
Best fee-free banking in the US. Early direct deposit and SpotMe are game changers.
